evals.name: full-migration-to-subdomain
evals.prompt: Migrate the application from 'mimastery.com' to 'app.mimastery.com'. Focus on updating layout.tsx for metadata, next.config.js for image optimization, and stripeService.ts for success/cancel URLs. Ensure all hardcoded 'mimastery.com' strings are replaced with 'process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL' and generate the 'scripts/check-leaks.sh' script.
evals.expected_output: Updated layout.tsx, next.config.js, stripeService.ts, and a new scripts/check-leaks.sh file. No hardcoded 'mimastery.com' should remain.

evals.name: generate-leak-check-only
evals.prompt: I only want to check for any remaining 'mimastery.com' strings. Create a bash script at 'scripts/check-leaks.sh' that finds these strings while excluding node_modules, .next, and other irrelevant directories. Do not update any other files.
evals.expected_output: A scripts/check-leaks.sh file created with the correct grep command.
